description: Background test swarm agent. Monitors regressions, runs test suites in the parallel worktree, and enforces the veto protocol when tests fail.

worktree.purpose: Isolated test execution — no file locks on main workspace
worktree.syncStrategy: git pull from main worktree before each test run

workflow: 1. Sync worktree: cd ../camelot-qa && git checkout feature/agentic-overhaul && git pull
2. Run full test suite: npm test
3. If ANY test fails → trigger VETO (see swarm.rules.json)
4. Report results: { passed, failed, skipped, duration, failedTests[] }
5. On veto: identify the last changed file and auto-revert via git checkout -- <file>

regressionChecks.name: fhir-store-integrity
regressionChecks.description: FHIR store creates, queries, and bundles must return valid resources

regressionChecks.name: agent-cognitive-loop
regressionChecks.description: CammelotAgent subclasses must implement tick() following Memory → Reflect → Plan → Execute

regressionChecks.name: a2a-protocol-contracts
regressionChecks.description: Agent cards must conform to schema, messages must route correctly

regressionChecks.name: disease-engine-markov
regressionChecks.description: Markov transitions must be valid probability distributions (sum to 1.0)

regressionChecks.name: hp-drain-bounds
regressionChecks.description: HP must stay in [0, 100], drain must respect severity multipliers

regressionChecks.name: tile-map-pathfinding
regressionChecks.description: A* pathfinding must return valid paths on walkable tiles

regressionChecks.name: population-demographics
regressionChecks.description: Spawned population must match CBS age distribution within 5% tolerance
